Preamble: Implementation of Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (ASL) in the State with effect from December, 2015
is being done. Funds under the scheme will henceforth be disbursed on the SNA-SPARSH system.
Therefore, the government was considering taking up a new unit-wise head of accounts under the scheme.
